name: REST EZ Inc.
business: Rest EZ Inc. sells a sleep aid supplement called Rest EZ Sleep Aid Supplement, a liquid gel capsule containing ingredients like valerian root and melatonin. The product is marketed to wholesalers, retailers, and online at www.RestEz.net. Intended customers are adults (persons over 18 years of age) who experience difficulty with sleeping.

exposures.sentence: Rest EZ Inc. has one sleep liquid gel capsule (named Rest EZ Sleep Aid Supplement).
